name: security-audit-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace exposing the security-audit skill — diff-mode LLM security review mapped to OWASP Top 10 + CWE.

plugins.name: security-audit
plugins.description: LLM-driven security review for git diffs. Maps each finding to OWASP Top 10 + CWE; covers DOM XSS, SQL/NoSQL/command injection, SSRF, IDOR, XXE, SSTI, mass assignment, prototype pollution, insecure storage, open redirects, missing CSP/CSRF/Helmet, weak crypto, hardcoded secrets, and Docker/compose misconfigurations.
